mapper.select: SELECT * FROM regular_account_record WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_current = 1 ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.* FROM regular_account_record r INNER JOIN asset_account a ON r.account_id = a.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_current = 1 AND a.is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regular_account_record (account_id, user_id, amount, currency, cny_rate, cny_amount, record_date, is_current, note, created_by) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{cnyRate}, #{cnyAmount}, #{recordDate}, 1, #{note}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE regular_account_record SET is_current = 0 WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND is_current = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM regular_account_record WHERE id = #{id} AND account_id = #{accountId}
